reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff of November 9, 2025, Rockstar Games has officially announced that Grand Theft Auto VI is delayed until November 19, 2026. Multiple authoritative sources, including Rockstar's own Newswire (Nov 6, 2025), confirm this delay. An earlier delay in May 2025 had already pushed the game from its original Fall 2025 window to May 2026. No version of the game was released or made available for sale in Europe during 2025. Given that the manufacturer has explicitly moved the launch to late 2026 and no distribution occurred in 2025, the probability of the game Being sold in Europe in 2025 is 5% (the minimum permitted probability).
